end,function(O,v)local h=a(v)local W=function(W,E,F,Y,y)return R(O,{W;E,F,Y;y},v,h)end return W end,function(O,v)local h=a(v)local W=function(W,E,F,Y)return R(O,{W,E;F;Y},v,h)end return W end,function(O,v)local h=a(v)local W=function(W,E,F)return R(O,{W;E;F},v,h)end return W end,{},{},function()f=(-600071+600072)+f x[f]=-917117-(-917118)return f end,function(O,v)local h=a(v)local W=function(W,E)return R(O,{W,E},v,h)end return W end,-403256-(-403256),function(O)local v,R=711589-711588,O[-984658+984659]while R do x[R],v=x[R]-(222298+-222297),v+(-702355-(-702356))if x[R]==163783+-163783 then x[R],q[R]=nil,nil end R=O[v]end end return(K(9736548-(-406904),{}))(h(y))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[v(-742830+707610)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
